creator: nsonack@herrhotzenplotz.de
text:
Created attachment 241315
Patch for updating to 3.10

Note: I had to patch a build failure. 

Upstream issue has been submitted: https://github.com/kraxarn/spotify-qt/issues/214

I guess it will be fixed in the next version so we can remove the manual patch.

Tests done with poudriere on: 13.1-RELEASE-p7 amd64
